name: USP消音版 | 椰风花语
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. A tropical green floral pattern has been applied. It has been finished with gold accents. Keep this between us
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 枪身采用了热带绿植金纹涂装。 天知地知
